task_description: Implement authentication and authorization system for Maestro with username/password login, group-based permissions (Administrators, Viewers, Approver, Operators, Developers), user management UI, and route protection.

verification.summary: All 340 tests pass (308 existing + 20 auth unit + 12 auth route/authorization tests). ruff check src/ passes clean. Review fixes applied: 401 JSON for non-HTML auth errors, secure cookie flag, password min length on user creation, last-admin deactivation safeguard.
